python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 30qubits_nocoupling --init-mode structured_linspace --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/30qubits/runs/20260318_dist_30q_nocoupling_j0/30qubits_nocoupling_structured
python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 30qubits_nocoupling --init-mode random_uniform --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --init-seed 2 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/30qubits/runs/20260318_dist_30q_nocoupling_j0/30qubits_nocoupling_random_seed=2
python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 30qubits_nocoupling --init-mode random_uniform --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --init-seed 42 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/30qubits/runs/20260318_dist_30q_nocoupling_j0/30qubits_nocoupling_random_seed=42
